auth.account_locked: Account locked. Try again in {minutes} minutes.

pages.title: Pages
pages.no_pages: No pages yet. Connect an AI to get started.
pages.confirm_delete_page: Are you sure you want to delete this page?

design.title: Design
design.templates_subtitle: Page templates available for your site

mcp.title: MCP Connection
mcp.endpoint_desc: This is the URL that AI tools will use to connect to your site.
mcp.quick_start_desc: Connect Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code, or any MCP-compatible tool.
mcp.step1_desc: Type a name (e.g. "Claude Desktop") and click Generate. A unique password for that connection will be created.
mcp.step2_title: Copy the configuration into your AI tool
mcp.step2_desc: After creating the password, a ready-to-paste JSON config will appear for your MCP client.
mcp.url_desc: Copy this URL and paste it into the MCP configuration of your AI tool (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, etc.).
mcp.json_config_desc: If your tool requires a JSON configuration file instead of a URL, use this block.
mcp.copy_config_desc: Copy this JSON and paste it into the MCP configuration of your tool (Claude Desktop, Cursor, etc.).
mcp.app_password_desc: Create a unique password for each AI tool you connect. You can revoke them individually at any time.
mcp.oauth_desc: For developers who need OAuth 2.0/2.1 integration with PKCE. If you just want to connect an AI tool, use the application passwords above.
mcp.confirm_revoke: Are you sure you want to revoke this?

updates.title: Updates
updates.major_warning: This is a major update. A full backup is recommended.

settings.title: Settings
settings.email_test_failed: Failed to send test email. Check your configuration.

assets.title: Files
assets.confirm_delete_asset: Are you sure you want to delete this file?

ai_images.title: AI Images
ai_images.prompt: Describe the image you want to generate
ai_images.no_api_key: Set up your Gemini API key in Settings to generate images

app_passwords.title: Application Passwords
app_passwords.label: Label
app_passwords.label_placeholder: e.g. Claude Desktop, Cursor, API Script
app_passwords.password_created: Application password created. Copy it now — it will not be shown again.

oauth.title: OAuth 2.0 / 2.1 Clients
oauth.subtitle: Compatible with OAuth 2.0 and OAuth 2.1. PKCE (S256) required for all clients.
oauth.client_created: OAuth client created. Copy the credentials now — the secret will not be shown again.
oauth.redirect_uri_help: Must be an exact match. No wildcards allowed (OAuth 2.1).
oauth.client_type_help: Confidential: server-side apps (has secret). Public: SPAs, native apps (uses PKCE only).
oauth.confirm_revoke_client: Revoke this OAuth client and all its tokens?
oauth.missing_fields: Client name and redirect URI are required.

indexing.disabled_description: Your site will not appear on Google or other search engines. Enable it when your site is ready to go public.
indexing.enabled_description: Your site is now visible to search engines. Remember to build your site to apply the changes.

security.title: Security
security.2fa_description: Add an extra layer of security to your account. After entering your password, you will be asked for a second verification factor.
security.totp_description: Use an app like Google Authenticator, 1Password, or Authy to generate temporary codes.
security.totp_scan_qr: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
security.email_description: Receive a one-time link in your email to verify your identity.
security.magic_link_sent: A link has been sent to your email. Check your inbox to continue.
security.magic_link_desc: A login link will be sent to your registered email address.
security.emergency_email_link: I can't access my authenticator, send me an email
security.emergency_email_sent: A recovery link has been sent to your email. Check your inbox.
security.no_email: No email configured for this user.
security.passkey_description: Sign in without a password using biometrics, security keys, or password managers like 1Password or iCloud Keychain.
security.passkey_prompt: Use your fingerprint, Face ID, or security key to verify your identity.
security.recovery_description: Recovery codes allow you to access your account if you lose access to your 2FA methods. Each code can only be used once.
security.recovery_codes_warning: Save these codes in a safe place. They will not be shown again.
security.confirm_regenerate: Previous codes will be invalidated. Continue?
security.confirm_disable: Are you sure you want to disable this?
security.disable_all_description: This will remove all 2FA methods and recovery codes. Your account will only be protected by password.
security.confirm_disable_all: Are you sure? Your account will lose two-factor protection.

install.title: Klytos Installation
install.copy_token: Copy this MCP token. It will not be shown again.
